finding_results.notes: The mother-shelf risk now stays on the page through the shed turn: Inez verifies the stripe has stopped at the clay-chip marker before the kiss, and after sex she immediately rechecks the shelf and confirms it is still holding before the ledger scene continues.
The abstract landing phrase is replaced with Silas's physical response to Inez's line, keeping the beat inside breath, grip, and bodily pressure.

summary: Revised the propagation-shed sequence so the mother-shelf emergency remains physically legible through the erotic turn and replaced the ledger-scene abstract hinge with an embodied reaction from Silas.
